title: Xcelium: "xmvlog: *E,NSEDGE (design.sv,5|14): Edge event 'edge' is not supported currently" on --protect_lib output

features.name: edge() function in sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always block with edge() function used in sensitivity list event expression

features.name: posedge or negedge in sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always block with posedge or negedge in sensitivity list using or combinational operator
